game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Small World – das Brettspiel is a turn-based digital board game where 2-5 players compete to conquer territories on a hex-grid map and accumulate the most victory points over a fixed number of rounds, typically 8-10. Each turn, players select a combination of one of 14 fantasy races and one of 20 special abilities, then deploy their limited number of race tokens by tapping and dragging them onto adjacent territories to initiate conquests. A conquest requires a specific number of tokens, usually 2 for an empty territory or 1 plus existing enemy tokens for an occupied one, with a final dice roll potentially deciding contested battles. Players can choose to put a race "into decline" to score points for a few more turns while selecting a new active race, managing their empire's expansion and decline to maximize points. Progression involves unlocking additional race and special ability combinations through game achievements, while difficulty scales with the number of AI opponents and their strategic aggression levels.
game_info.description: Command fantasy races to conquer territories on a hex-grid map! Select a race-ability combination, deploy tokens to adjacent territories, and accumulate victory points over 8 rounds. Conquer empty lands (costs 2 tokens) or occupied ones (costs 2 + enemy tokens). Put races into decline to score residual points while activating a new race. Compete against AI opponents to become the supreme conqueror!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate/select territories and race combinations
Space: Confirm selection (deploy tokens, choose race combo, end turn)
Shift: Put current race into decline
Z: Undo last token placement (before confirming)
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart to main menu
Enter: Start game from main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and territory selection mechanics. Verifies that the player can navigate the hex grid, select territories, and interact with the UI elements correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through different territories using arrow keys, select various hexes, and test race combination selection on the first turn. Verify state updates properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should respond to all navigation inputs, update selected territory highlights, and allow progression through the initial game setup phase without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal conquest strategy to win the game. Implements aggressive expansion focusing on high-value territories and efficient token management to maximize victory points.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Select powerful race-ability combinations early. Prioritize conquering territories adjacent to current holdings. Strategically decline races to maintain two active forces. Target territories with bonus points and expand efficiently.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully reach GAME_OVER_WIN state by accumulating the highest victory points after 8 rounds through strategic conquests and optimal race management.
